title: Stuff you might have missed in Q
display_title: Stuff you might have missed in Q
wikitext:
[]: Stuff you might have missed in Q             Quote Post by Fredsq » Mon May 11, 2015 4:12 pm I didn’t feel like bumping an old thread, so I created this one with some stuff I recently found out whilst rewatching Q. I DID read the whole thread or almost all of it, so I’m fairly sure these weren’t mentioned before: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon May 11, 2015 4:48 pm Just a note, the way "Lilin+ " was rendered in the Preview, it was more akin to "Lilin + ADAMS/whatever else/whatever else", not "Lilin+" as some super-powered human. Interesting stuff you caught!

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon May 11, 2015 5:17 pm Certainly the multiple mentions of "barrier" deserve to be considered to see if they really form a unity. I guess it would help if someone could verify that they all correspond to the same Japanese term, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Fredsq » Mon May 11, 2015 5:31 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Just a note, the way "Lilin+ " was rendered in the Preview, it was more akin to "Lilin + ADAMS/whatever else/whatever else", not "Lilin+" as some super-powered human. Interesting stuff you caught!

[]:             Quote Post by Signer » Sat May 16, 2015 1:29 pm If I'm hearing this right, Asuka's phrase in the end and the one about EVA 01 in the Wunder use the same "kekkai mitsudo" for "barrier density" so they probably the same thing. What really interesting here is that Kaoru calls the barrier around Lilith's chamber... well, " L ilith's barrier".

[]:             Quote Post by Fredsq » Mon May 18, 2015 9:14 pm Signer wrote: If I'm hearing this right, Asuka's phrase in the end and the one about EVA 01 in the Wunder use the same "kekkai mitsudo" for "barrier density" so they probably the same thing. What really interesting here is that Kaoru calls the barrier around Lilith's chamber... well, " L ilith's barrier".

[]:             Quote Post by Signer » Tue May 19, 2015 7:20 am Yes, "the lid". I agree that it is probably something different. But it is not unthinkable for this core-transforming atoms to form a physical barrier if density is high enough. Otherwise it would really seem that corefication is only EVA 01's doing.

Article: Stuff you might have missed in Q
uka's phrase in the end and the one about EVA 01 in the Wunder use the same "kekkai mitsudo" for "barrier density" so they probably the same thing. What really interesting here is that Kaoru calls the barrier around Lilith's chamber... well, " L ilith's barrier".

[]:             Quote Post by Signer » Tue May 19, 2015 7:20 am Yes, "the lid". I agree that it is probably something different. But it is not unthinkable for this core-transforming atoms to form a physical barrier if density is high enough. Otherwise it would really seem that corefication is only EVA 01's doing.
